title: Projects & Ventures
description: Portfolio of projects, ventures, and initiatives

projects.name: Since AI
projects.tagline: AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital
projects.description: Execution-focused AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital.
projects.longDescription: Since AI is an AI community and innovation platform focused on connecting builders, companies, research institutions, and capital. Through strategic partnerships with technology companies and practical program design, Since AI drives community engagement and applied AI development.

projects.name: Root
projects.tagline: Recruitment and talent platform connecting ambitious technology talent with companies
projects.description: Recruitment and talent platform/event concept connecting ambitious technology talent with companies.
projects.longDescription: Root is a recruitment and talent platform connecting ambitious technology talent with companies. With strategic relationships across technology companies and industry speakers, Root creates networking opportunities for 1000+ participants.

projects.name: Kolt
projects.tagline: Automation and operational technology company focused on practical business workflows
projects.description: Automation and operational technology company focused on practical business workflows.
projects.longDescription: Kolt develops automation solutions addressing operational challenges through technology integration. Building platforms designed for practical business workflows with real-time data processing and remote management capabilities.

projects.name: Attractor
projects.tagline: Technology consultancy building production-grade software, automation, and AI systems
projects.description: Technology consultancy building production-grade software, automation, and AI systems.
projects.longDescription: Attractor is a technology consultancy building production-grade software, applied AI, and automation systems. Operating at the intersection of technical delivery and commercial execution, helping teams turn goals into shipped outcomes through practical AI integration and solution architecture.
